rationale: Keep: the citing paper’s note explicitly says it “synthesizes transaction cost theory with behavioral-economics/self-concept maintenance ideas,” and tests “morally malleable reasoning” as a mechanism, which directly aligns with the cited paper’s core contribution (the theory of self-concept maintenance in dishonesty). This suggests plausible foundational/mechanism use rather than an incidental background mention. The DOI match (10.1509/jmkr.45.6.633) confirms the specific target reference.
